data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for linkage to authorization and/or BAA.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the linkage to authorization and/or BAA when relevant. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific records or API responses that demonstrate this linkage. The linked use case mentions the need for such linkage but lacks concrete evidence or endpoints that fulfill this requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of linkage to authorization and/or BAA.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
